availability.p: Distributed under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 license.

editorialDecl.p: The model used to generate the Kannada text was gemini-3-pro-preview, which is reasonably good with Kannada, but still fails on letters found only in earlier stages of the language such as ṟ and ḻ. I have restored these letters when I encountered them, but errors may still remain.

T.V.V.’s text is unusually presented with a form of normalization that we call “un-bindu.” This means that the bindu, representing a word-internal or word-final nasal, is restored in word-final contexts to either n or m, depending on what T.V.V. has judged the underlying form to be.

In addition, in transliterating the text, I have applied un-bindu word-internally as well, replacing all cases of word-internal ṁ followed by a stop consonant with the appropriate class nasal (ṅ, ñ, ṇ, n, m).

I have inconsistently applied “syllable-space,” which means inserting a space between the final consonant of one word and the initial vowel of a following word. In cases where the final consonant results from a lōpasandhi of a final vowel, that lōpa is marked with an apostrophe.

I have retained the labels for the metrical forms found in T.V.V.’s edition, but I have removed the punctuation (including single and double daṇḍas) and verse numbers from the TEI encoding (these can be restored in transformation).

div.head:
sāhasabhīmavijayam
prathamāśvāsam

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: naneyumban mige kaṇṇalar‌ makaraman krīḍādhvajam pōle ka
rbina billan gele purbu candrabalaman kaivāradindam tadā
nanacandran kuḍe dēse poccaposatāytumbannegam māḍke nū

lg.label: u॥
lg.l: ṭṭe raṇōtsāhada cakravartivibhavam puṭṭittu kaygutti niṁ
ḷgeregaṁ tandeya kīrtiyuṁ baḷedudēn satyāśrayan dhanyanō

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: ṭṭige samarāgradoḷ pariye pintane sanduvu rājaputrarā
negaḻ ene munnamemba baṭikeṁ ba janōktiyoḷāytu sūcika

lg.label: u॥
lg.l: dandaṟeyiṭṭe muṭṭi piḍitandu calam nile mīṟalendu po

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: gadu kolalendu māṇṇanadu takkuda liṅgamanappukeydu piṁ
gade nile nīranōḍi page peṇṇaḍeyuṭṭare puttanēṟ ko

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: ttaiti kuvaraṅkarāmaninadēn kaṭevādudo mūḻu su. ḻikoḷaṁ

lg.label: ma.sra॥
lg.l: tta narēndrar‌ pokkarillembarumivanadhikan pokkanendu pavaṇ ba

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: kada gāndhāriya putraroḷ modaligan duryōdhanan dharmayu

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: negaḻdu rasam manaṅgoḷise mārgamoṇḍambaḍe dē[si] kabbaman
mmage koḷalāṭipan doreyo rakkaso kaḷḷano bandikāṟanō

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: rpuvu guṇadōṣaman nikaṣamiṭṭu parīkṣisi nōḍa tāve pē

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: pratibhe nisargamuṇṭu kiṟidordugaḷoḷ kiṟiduṇṭu balle śī
svati varavittavol kelabarordade kēḷade kallaḷante ga

div.p:
va॥ ā prastāvadoḷ dvaṣṭādvaṣṭaparampareyemba vr̥ddhakañcukiyuṁ
buddhamatiyemba mēḷada keḷadiyuṁ berasu dēvāsurayuddhakke karagaṁ
bottaḷambantanavaratabāṣpavāridhārāpūraparivāritapallavanētreyu
masahyaparibhavānaladandahyamānagātreyumāgi yajñavēdīsambhaveyuṁ
yājñasēniyuṁ drupadarājōpavanajayavaijayantiyumenisida
pāñcālarājatanūje pavamānatanūjanallige bandu

va॥ endu nondu nuḍiye marunnandanan darahasitavadanāravindanāgi
tannantargatadoḷ
va॥ endupalakṣisi
va॥ endanilasutan nijāgrajaṅge muḷidu
va॥ endu tanagamajurnagamoḍane muḷidu

va॥ endu paścāttāpaṅgeydu kurukulaviḷayajvāle suyōdhanapraḷayakāle
pāñcāliya vadanaman nōḍi
va॥ endu mattamintendan

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: piriduṁ kānteya munde pūṇṇu nuḍidan cāḷukyakaṇṭhīravan

div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kavirannaviracitamappa cāḷukyacakravarti
śrīsāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ bhīmasēnapratijñāvarṇanam
prathamāśvāsam

div.head: dvitīyāśvāsam
div.p:
va॥ antu kauravakulakālānalanuṁ duśyāsanadanujaviśālavakṣaḥsthaḷa
kēḷīnvapasiṁhanuṁ kururājānujamahāmahījamūlōnmūlana
praḷayaprabhañjananuṁ prabaḷaripubaḷabhujabalaparikṣēpa ghūrṇitārṇa
praḷayārṇavanuṁ pracaṇḍabhujabalāvaṣṭambhagambhīranuṁ kururājanirvyā
janibaḍōrudvayabhaṅgapratijñābhāranuṁ phaṇipatikētanadhūmakētuvuṁ
pāṇḍavabalapradīpanuṁ pāṇḍavabalaprākāranuṁ ēkāṅgavīranuṁ
jarāsandhasandhibandhavighaṭananuṁ satyāśrayakulatilakanuṁ iṭivabeḍaṅganuṁ
sāhasabhaṭar javanuṁ cāḷukyanārāyaṇanuṁ cāḷukyakaṇṭhīravanuṁ
cāḷukyamātarṇḍanuṁ akalaṅkacaritanuṁ ammana gandhavāraṇanuṁ
sāhasāṅkanumenisida bhīmasēnanantu ārūḍhakōpanuṁ pratijñā
rōdhanuvāge—
va॥ endanalanandaneyanilanandanan pogaḻdu
va॥ endu modalisi nuḍiya buddhimatiyintendaḷ

va॥ enaluṁ vr̥ddhakañcukiyintendaḷ avara pūrvajarapurasugaḷoḷageyōdhyā
puraparamēśvaranuṁ satyādiguṇāśrayavallabhanumatiprauḍhadiśā dantiprakaṭa
prabhāvanappa satyāśrayadēvanin viṣṇuvardhanaparanāmadhēyanuṁ rāṣṭrakūṭa
gajaghaṭāvighaṭanasiṁhanenisida jayasiṁhadēvanin atipravardhanaprajānu
rāganumatiprabalaraṇarāmanumenisida [raṇarāga]siṁhanin vātāpipura
varēśvaranumaśvamēdhayajñadīkṣitanuṁ dvīpāntaraprakaṭaprabhāvanumenisida
pulakēśidēvanin parirakṣitapavitradharmanenisida kīrtivarmadēvanin
tattanayanapperaḍaneya satyāśrayadēvanin avana kiṟiya maganappa
maṅgaḷārṇavanin satyāśrayanapperaḍaneya satyavratiyin tattanayanappa
ādityavarmanin tadapatyanappa vikramādityanin tatputranappa dugdhamallanin
tannandananappa niravadyāparanāmadhēyanappa vijayādityabhaṭṭārakanin
tattanūmitranappa vikramārkananenisida koṅkaṇa vikramādityanin
tattanūmitranappa kīrtivarmanin ātana kiṟiya maganappa bhīmaparākramanin
tajñātanapperaḍaneya kīrtivarmanin tattanūvappa piriya tailapanin
ātana maganappa mukundiya koṇḍa kundiya bhīmanin ātana maganappa
vikramādityadēvanin ātana magan appa raṇaraṅgamallanenippayyaṇadēvanin
ātana maganuttuṅgamallanenisida vikramādityanin cāḷukyakulōdbhavan appa
vikramādityadēvaṅgaṁ caidyakulōdbhaveyappa bontādēvigaṁ puṭṭidan

॥svasti॥ samastabhuvanāśrayan śrī pr̥thvīvallabhan mahārājādhirājan
rājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan karahaṭabhayaṅkaran jādiḷāndhra
kulīnabhuvanasadguṇamaṇivabhūṣaṇan sindhurakandharādhirūḍhapallakōṟō
llaṅghanan bhadrakavidrāvaṇan koṅkaṇabhayaṅkaran ubhayabaladaḷḷaṇan
mārmalevarigajakēsari karindrakaṇṭhīravamallan vairiphaṇīndrasauparṇan
kākalikarājagajakēsari raṇakumbhikumbhakaṇṭhīravan yādavakulāmbara
dyumaṇi raṇaraṅgabhīṣaṇan ripubalamañjagajaghaṭābhañjanan sāmanta
mr̥gaśārdūlan raṇaraṅgarākṣasan akalaṅkarāman taḷavargataḷaprahāran
ariṣṭagharaṭṭarāṣṭrakūṭakāḷakūṭan nijabhujacakravarti pāñcālamadēbha
pañcānanan saṁhārasiṁhitvapūrjaravajradāḍhāpūrjarabhayajvara [sappa]
māḷavasaptārcaśatrugrahōccāṭananuṁ mattaṁ anēkadēśādhīśvaran paranr̥pa
madagajaghaṭābhañjananumuttakyamallan śrīmannūrmaḍityailapanenisidāhava
malladēvanin uditōditavāgi banda cāḷukyavaṁśadoḷilliyaminnevaregaṁ
nuḍidu husivuduṁ āḍi aḷukuvuduṁ kūḍi tappuvuduṁ bēḍidargi
llembuduṁ kādi sōlvuduṁ pēḻveṇṇan piḍiyisuvuduṁ kanasinoḷ
mōḍavillam—
va॥ embuduṁ

va॥ bhīmasēnananumatadoḷ narmasacivanuṁ parihāsakēḷiśīlanumenisida
vidūṣakanendan ele vr̥ddhakañcuki nīnuṁ dēvāsurayuddhakke karagambotta
ḍāvaraḍākiniyenisida pāñcāliyuṁ buddhimatiyemba mēḻada gāḷu
doṭṭuminte mūvaruṁ banda vaṁśāvaḷiyuman nijāvaḷiyuma
noḷpoggi pēḻde ninna cennabhāṣitamadoḷpuṭṭadudidēninnelliya dhr̥tarāṣṭra
nettaṇa gāṅgēyanelliya sandhikāryam duśyāsanādigaḷappa nūrvar
kauravarumanuguvārge kondikkidaninorbanuḷidan duryōdhananan
kolvuduṁ gelvuduṁ nammarasaṅgāvudu gahanamadarke cintisidirimendu
pāñcālarājatanūjeya mogaman nōḍi

va॥ endu vidūṣakanuttuṁ banda tannaṁ naguttuṁ pōpante santōṣaṁ
māḍidudakoḍambaṭṭu cāruhāsini nijanivāsakke pōdaḷ.

annagamitta śantanutanūjanuṁ mandākinīnandananuṁ vasiṣṭhaśāpavasundharā
vatīrṇāvaśiṣṭavasuvuṁ jāmadagnyaśiṣyanuṁ paraśurāmavijayiyuṁ
kanakatāḷadhvajanuṁ dēvavratiyuṁ svēcchāmr̥tyuvuṁ kurukulapitāmahanuṁ
āhavabhīṣmanumenisida bhīṣmana śaraśayanadoḷaṁ bhāradvājagōtranuṁ
kumbhasambhavanumubhayabalapradhānōpādhyāyanuṁ trailōkyadhanurdharanuṁ
rudrāvatārajanakanuṁ jāmadagnya śastrasarvasvapratigrahapraṇayapavitraprabhāvanuṁ
cāpasāmarthyasampannanuṁ śōṇāśvasēnayajña sārathiyuṁ kanakakalaśadhvajanu
menisida billa jāṇaṁ drōṇanaṭivinoḷaṁ sindhudēśādhīśvaranuṁ duśśaḷeya
manōnayanavallabhanuṁ śalyasārathiyuṁ duśyāsanana manōratha sārathi
yumenisida tanna maidunan jayadrathana vipattinoḷaṁ bhaumasutanuṁ
śatamakhasahāyanuṁ catulakṣagajaghaṭāvēṣṭitanuṁ supratīkasindhura
bandhurakandharādhirūḍhanuṁ dr̥ḍhasamayabāhuprabhāvōdāttanumenisida
bhagadattana maraṇadoḷaṁ kurukulavr̥ddhanuṁ bhōribhujabalāvaṣṭambha gambhīra
num enisida bhūriśravana viyōgadoḷaṁ saubalabhyapadbala vindānubinda
prabhr̥tigaḷaṭivinoḷaṁ yuvarājanuṁ drupadarājanandanāmbarakabarikā
kr̥ṣṭidhr̥ṣṭakanumenisida tannaṇuganamman duśyāsanana pañcatvaprapañcadoḷaṁ
dinakaratanayanuṁ rādhēyanuṁ aṅgaviṣayādhīśvaranuṁ svabhāvaśauryā
vatāranuṁ kāḷavaṭṭa kārmukanuṁ kārmukaguruśiṣyanuṁ jāmadagnya
śiṣyanuṁ sahajakavacālaṅkr̥taśarīranuṁ madagaja[kakṣa]lakṣaṇadhvajanuṁ pratidina
pravartitāṣṭādaśakōṭi suvarṇadānasantarpitasakalabhūsuralōkanuṁ
mahābhāratasamarasāgarasamuttaraṇapariṇatāntaḥkaraṇapariṇatakarṇadhāranu
menisida tannaṇugāḷappa karṇana sāvinoḷaṁ madraviṣayādhipatiyuṁ
vyāghrakētananuṁ śastranirbharanipuṇanuṁ samarēbhaśalyanumenisida tanna
māvanappa śalyana saṁharaṇadoḷaṁ kurukulacūḍāmaṇiyuṁ gāndhārī
dhr̥tarāṣṭranandananuṁ bhānumatīvadanakamalabhānuvuṁ candramatīnayana
kuvalayacandranuṁ duśyāsanāgrajanmanuṁ lakṣaṇajanakanuṁ pannagapatākanuṁ
kanakalatālāñchitōttuṅgaghanagadāyudhanuṁ divyamunivarāparādhanuṁ
sakalalakṣmīnivāsanuṁ samaradhairyanuṁ mahāśauryanuṁ rādhēyanija
sahāyanuṁ [ca]ladaṅkamallanuṁ sakalabhōgalakṣmīpatiyuṁ abhimāna
dhananumenisida suyōdhanan cintākrāntanāgi

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: nosaloḷ kaṇṇaḍamandu necci poreden tānakke tammimmana
bisuṭar jōḷada pāṭiyan bagedarilla drōṇiyuṁ drōṇanuṁ

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: nnoḷpamin tīrada tanna kāryabharaman tīrcal peṟar gaṇḍari

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: yada mātan taguḷe gaṭipi pōdan sandhi

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: dvājan gaḍa billa balmeyuṁ kulamuṁ ni

div.p: va॥ endarasanavarge virasavāgi paruṣaṁnuḍiye sañjayan tannantargatadoḷ
va॥ endu sañjayan kururājanan nōḍi

lg.label: ma॥sra॥
lg.l: rgavanoḷ divyāstraman mun paḍedu negaḻda śauryakke takkandadin
pāṇḍavaruṁ kauravaruṁ kaimugiye negaḻda pempige takkandadin bi
lgovajan gāṇḍīviyoḷ kādidanavara śarāsāraman nīne kaṇḍai

lg.label: ma॥sra॥
lg.l: nmadarellar nōḍe pampan kadanadoḷedaṭan tōrcidan sindhuputran

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: rmaratan tammana pēṟme dharmatanayan ninnan nabhōmārgadoḷ

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: nr̥pa ninnan piḍiduyke bhānumatiyan santaisi citrāṅgadaṁ

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: rvara piḷḷeya pōda jīvaman tandan baṁ

lg.label: u॥
lg.l: doṭṭida ponna rāsigaḷanittu dharāmarargandu tande pē

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: uri koḷe kōḷtigam koḷe viṣāhikuḷam koḷe śatrubhūmiyoḷ

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: kānanaman biṭṭu bandu sarasati siri ta

div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kaviratnaviracitamappa cāḷukyacakravarti
śrīsāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ sañjayavacanavyavarṇanam
dvitīyāśvāsam

div.head: tr̥tīyāśvāsam
div.p: va॥ endu sañjayan sāhasabhīmana sāhasaṅgaḷanabhivarṇisuvan

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: dōṇeyindam tegavāgaḷondu tuḍuvāgaḷ pattu bāṇam dhanu
rguṇadindam biḍuvalli nūṟu parivāgaḷ sāsiram vairimā
rgaṇaman chēdisuvalli lakṣa naḍuvāgaḷ kōṭi sēnāṅgadoḷ

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: kali kaṭṭāne kaḍaṅgi kolva teṟadin kondan marunnandanan

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: di karadvaitade gurdi gurdi karināgam nurgunurgappinaṁ

lg.label: mā॥sra॥
lg.l: yamarājan tande bhōjaprabhave tanage tāy māydunan vāsudēvan

div.p: va॥ endu nuḍida sañjayana nuḍige phaṇirājakētanan siḍildu-

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: nanadoḷ valkaladhāriyāgi haranoḷ divyāstraman bēḍe be
vana naṇṭan naṭanāgi bārada bhavam bandan pr̥thānandanan

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: diravumanalke pārthanadu rambheya śāpamo tanna pāpamō

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: dananane dharmanandananenal dore diggajamotte birdu bi

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: guruvan pūjippacāpanan pusidu koṇḍā bīraman bhīṣmaran
trare ballar maṟeyille sāhasadhanan duryōdhanan ballanē

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: rmamo bhūlōkake pēṟimī doreya cāritram pr̥thāputrarā

div.p:
va॥ endu dhr̥tarāṣṭranandanan dharmanandananuman vāyunandananu
man sakrandananandananumanśvinīnandanaruman nirākaraṇaṅgeydu
nijadoḷ māṟāḍe-

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: dguruvembar peṟag’ ēke tēranesapan dharmānujaṅgēke kiṁ

div.p:
va॥ endu duryōdhanan haranuman purandaranuman kapirājanuman
kañjōdaranuman nirākaraṇaṅgeydanijadoḷ māṟāḍe samarōdyōga
gaṅgeyya sañjayanañjade mārkoṇḍu—

va॥ endu nuḍida sañjayana nuḍi karṇakaṭhōramāge duryōdhana
naḍarke nirvvēsi

va॥ endu nuḍidu kāladaṇḍapracaṇḍamappa tanna gadādaṇḍaman
bhujādaṇḍadoḷeḷavaḍisikoṇḍu pāṇḍavargabhimukhanāgi naḍeva
pannagapatākana muḷisinandavanaṟidu sañjayanañjade māṟkoṇḍu

va॥ endu nuḍida sañjayana nuḍige piṅgākṣanativiṣamaparuṣa
vēṣāvēṣadharan āgi

va॥ antu naramāṁsaman mahāmāṁsamendu naratailaman mahātailamendu
naravāṁsabaliyendu mahāvāṁsabaliyendu dīrghanidreyan
mahānidreyendu dīrghaprāṇaman mahāprāṇamendu snuhivr̥kṣaman
mahāvr̥kṣamendu nuḍivante bhīmanan mahārathanendu nuḍiyal
takkude valaṁ endarasanavaṅge virasavāgi paruṣaman nuḍiye
sañjayan añji—

va॥ endāḍedu maunam sarvārthasādhanam embudu ītaṅganukūla
vr̥ttiyuṁ svacchandānuvr̥ttiyumāgi negaḻdu[du] entuṁ ārādhyaṁ na
prakōpayēt endu maunaṅgoṇḍu sañjayan kiṟidubēgamidur
phaṇirājakētanan yuddhasannaddhanāgi naḍevudan kaṇḍu mattamā sañjayan
nisargamūkhanuṁ svabhāvadr̥ḍhanuṁ svāmihitanumappudaṟindaralāṟade—

va॥ ā baladēvaśvatthāmarumidaravarivarumallade kr̥pakr̥tavarmāru
midarntu nālvaroḷorbaṅge vīrapaṭṭaman kaṭṭi vīrapramukhaṅge
sēnāpatyābhiṣēkaman māḍi pageyan kayy māḻpud’ embuduṁ
sañjayana nuḍige duryōdhanan int’ endan

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: nile nilvar nūṅke nūṅku var gele gelvar

div.p:
va॥ ene sañjayanā prastāvadoḷ bhīṣmadrōṇakarṇaduśyāsanaśalyaśakuni
saindhavabhūriśravasōmadattabhagadattasaubalabhr̥hadbalabāhlīkavindānu
vindādigaḷa sāvinoḷ sarvāṅgavikaḷarāgiddar dhr̥tarāṣṭragāndhāri
yara caraṇāravindavandanaṅgeydu dēvara manaḥkṣatamanāṟisalvēlvudu
bīḍiṅge bijayaṅgeydud’ ene—

lg.label: mā॥sra॥
lg.l: vahamakkuṁ munnamannirpaṟikeya sabhe mattantadaṁ pokku nōḷpen

div.p:
va॥ embannegaṁ sakalacaturaṅgabalavikaḷanāgi saptāṅgarājyasamāliṅgitanāgi
saṅgrāmaraṅgadoḷiddarnembudanāptacararaṟave kēḷtu gāndhāriyuṁ
dhr̥tarāṣṭranuṁ śōkākulīkr̥tacittarāgi tamma magananārayduṁ
manaḥkṣatamanāṟisalumandaṟisuttuṁ bandu—

va॥ endu paṭiyisuttuṁ barpa gurujanada saraman sañjayanaṟidu
karakamalamukuḷitāñjaliyāgi dēvā ninnallige nijajananījanakaraṟisuttuṁ
bandar embuduṁ udvr̥ttagōtrābhimukhan vajrāghātamādante siggāgi
taleyan bāgi—

lg.label: ma॥vi॥
lg.l: aribhūpālaranikki geld’ osageyin tūryatrayam poṇme sō

div.p:
va॥ antu mūrchāprasaṅganāda pannagapatākaṅge śiśirōpacārakriyagaḷan
māḻpa sañjayaniravan tatparijanam kaṇḍu pēḻve gāndhāri manadoḷaḷḷi
baḷḷi nanakonavōgi—

va॥ endu gāndhāri vipulāpāṅgiy dhr̥tarāṣṭran sakalarāṣṭrarāja
kirīṭakōṭitāḍitacaraṇāravindadvandvanenisida tanna nandanana kāla
mēle kavidubildu

va॥ endu karuṇākrandanaṅgeydu gurujanaṅgaḷa saraman sañjayan
māṇisi karṇaduśyāsanādigaḷa sāvinoḷ śōkōdrēkadin
mūrchāgatanāgiddarpanigaḷa cētarisugumannegaṁ vipralāpa
manupasaṁharipudene samāhitāntaḥkaraṇaruvāgi-

va॥ antu mūrcheyindettu nijajananījanakaran kaṇḍu lajjābharadin
śiramānanatam māḍe sañjayan dhr̥tarāṣṭraṅgaṁ gāndhārigaṁ
nijatanūjanappa rājarājan kurukulamadhyamahītaḷasahakārabhūruham
nimage vinamitōttamāṅganādanavadharisuvudu ene tadīyavacanāmr̥ta
sparśanadindānandacittarāgi taḍavarisiyuṁ tabbarisiyuṁ tegedappiyuṁ
manaḥkṣataśarīranan paramāśīrvacanaśatasahasraṅgaḷin parasi punaḥpunarā
liṅganaṅgeydu kiṟidānuṁ bēgadin vigataparijanaṁmāḍi—
va॥ antu kurunarēndranan andhanarēndran abhyarthisi—

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: karaśauryan kaḍukeydu ninnanujaran kondikkidan kūḍe nū

div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kaviratnaviracitamappa cāḷukyacakravarti
śrīsāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ dhr̥tarāṣṭravacanavyāvarṇanam
tr̥tīyāśvāsam

div.head: caturthāśvāsam
div.p:
va॥ adaṟin ātanoḷ appa samarānubandhaman māṇbud’ enn’ embudan imbu
keydudenda dhr̥tarāṣṭrana nuḍiyan gāndhāri samabhyarthisi tānuṁ
prārthisi—

va॥ endu gāndhāri tanna mattina makkaḷan nenedu duḥkham
maḻukoḷisi duḥkhaṅgeyda sañjayan jaḍidu—
va॥ embuduṁ vr̥ddharājan kururājaṅgabhimukhanāgi
va॥ endu nuḍida narēndrana nuḍige sañjayanoḍambaṭṭu—

va॥ nīn entum emma pēḻdudan kayyollade vairamane kaykoṇḍu
pāṇḍunandanaroḷ kādidallade sandhiyanoḍambaḍeyappinaṁ
nīnemaginitanoḷḷeykellēlvudu negaḻva kajjamāvuduman
nimmajjanoḷālōcisi negaḻvudu allige bijayaṅgeyyudene
mahāprasādav’ endadan oḍambaṭṭantegeyyen endu nijagurujanaman
bīḷkoṇḍu bīḍiṅge pōgalvēḻdu kiṟidu pōḻtu śōkānu
bandhadoḷ kōpānubandhamuṁ samarānubandhamumantarisidur
sañjayadvitīyanuṁ nijabhujagadāsahāyanuvāgi saṅgrāmabhūmi
yoḷagane barpalli—
va॥ āgaḷadaṁ kaṇḍu—
va॥ āgaḷadaṁ kaṇḍu sañjayan manmōdgatakaṇṭhanumāgi—

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: bina karavāḷa kakkaḍeya kuntada dhāregaḷurci saṁyugā

div.p:
va॥ endu gaḷagaḷane kaṇṇīran ne[ga]puva sañjayanan abhimānadhanan
māṇisi—
endu kurukulāvaṣṭambhan kāryāvaṣṭambhanāgi baruttuṁ

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: moneyoḷidirca satta bhaṭanan gajadantadoḷaṇṇe satta bī
rananaḍaṭin sahasrabhaṭaran raṇadoḷ peṇedikki satta gaṁ

div.p: va॥ antadan nōḍuttuṁ barevare
va॥ āgaḷ sañjayanarasana cittavr̥ttiyanaṟidu

va॥ endu sañjayanarasaṅge navarasaman abhinavarasampāḍi tōṟuttuṁ
barevare

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: tati moḷe tēvante samardu biḻe saṅgaradoḷ

div.p:
va॥ endintu tōṟi nuḍiyu savyāpasavyasaṁmiśritaniśitanārācaparamparābhi
saṅghaṭṭitapracaṇḍaśuṇḍāḷamaṇḍalamastakapiṇḍamūla vividhadāruṇāruṇa
salilasaṁvardhitasahasramukhaprasāritasarasvatīsaritpravāhanivahabhayānakamuṁ
samarasahasrārimukhīkaragadāparighasaṅghātasañcūrṇitasakalamakuṭa
baddhamaṇigaṇamarīcimañjarīviracita suraśarāsanasahasrasambhāditagagana
maṇḍalamuṁ ubhayabalasubhaṭakōṭaparasparābhinigharṣaṇasaṅghaṭṭana
visphuritavisphuliṅganicayacakacakitanikhiḷadiṅmaṇḍalamuṁ akhilakarituraga
rathabhaṭabalakabandhanartanāvalōkanātikutūhalōnmīlitaniśācarapiśāca
bhūtavētāḷōttuṅgakarataḷānana kōḷāhaḷakaḷakaḷāṭṭahāsahāsasantrāsita
sakalakaṭakacaturaṅgabalamakuṭasaṅghaṭita cakracatulagatiyuddhāyudha
pātarudhirakardamasamr̥ddhitamamappa saṅgrāmabhūmiyoḷagane barpalli—
va॥ enuttuṁ barevare

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: varajana nettaran kuḍivenappoḍe bhīmane pīrdaneydu bhī
ṣmara bisinettaran kuḍivoḍinnumoḷan kururāja ninna ne

div.p: va॥ adan kēḷuttuṁ barevare

va॥ enda maruḷa mātu tanage karṇakaṭhōramāge tanage munnaṁ maitrēyar
koṭṭa ūrubhaṅgaśāpaman nenenenedu manadoḷ kaṭṭukkaḍadu tān
mahāstravappudaṟindamonduman bageyade maruḷa mātinoḷ
puruḷēnandarasan pōgalvōgē—

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: aragina māḍadoḷ viṣada laḍḍugeyoḷ kolaloḍḍi baddhama
tsaradoḷe vairaman paḍedu bhīmananinnitarkkaṁ tanda nīn

div.p:
va॥ ene suyōdhanan kēṇigegeldu maruḷa mātinoḷ maruḷillandu
kiṟideḍeyan pōgalvōgē

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: nuḍiyade pōgalēyenale pōḍoḍe dhūrjaṭiyāṇe mīṟi pō

div.p: va॥ antu bahuḷaprētavāyapradēśaṅgaḷanentānuṁ kaḷedu pōgalvōgē

lg.label: ma॥sra॥
lg.l: rdano bhīṣman nōḍuven tōṟise kurukulanan sañjayan koṇḍupōdan

div.p: va॥ antu pōgē

va॥ antenisirda nisargaduṣṭadyumnakkacanigrahakaraviluḷitamauḷi
yāgirda bhāradvājaniravan rājarājan nōḍi
va॥ endu duḥkhaṅgeydu rājarājan tadīya tanujanan nenedu—

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: vade muḍiyoḷ poraḷci taleyan tegevalli pinākavettavō

div.p: va॥ endu guruvandananan nindisi guruvanabhivandisi—

va॥ endu kumbhasambhavanan tripradakṣiṇaṅgeydu baruttumā diśābhāgadoḷ
śarasandōhaśayyuśaranikaradin kṣīṇētaranāgi śarācāryagargabhimukhanāgi
va॥ antātananaḷikētanan nōḍi—
va॥ endātmagatadoḷe bagedu
va॥ endabhimanyukumārana sāhasakke mecci

va॥ antabhimanyuge kayygaḷan mugidu baruttuṁ tanna maganappa lakṣaṇa
kumāranan nenedu manmōdgatakaṇṭhanāgi tadāsannapradēśadoḷ tanna
kumāranan kaṇḍu—
endalli nilalāṟade pradēśadin taḷedu—

va॥ endāṟisuttuṁ barevare dharmaputrakōpānaladagdhamānanāgirda śalyanuman
vijayaśaraviluḷitanāgirda bhagadattanuman gāṇḍīvipracaṇḍakōdaṇḍa
śaraśayananāgirda sindhurājanuman sahadēvakhaḍgōgrahastadhvastanāgirda
śakuniyuman nakulakuntakabaḷitaśarīrarāgirda dandaśūkarenisida
śatabinduvina sutapañcakamuman nivātakavacataḷataḷūkapālōma
pramukhamahāsamartharenipa daityāvatāraruman kāmarūpa
dēśādhīśvararuman ṣaṣṭisahasra kōṭiśiradharumappādaśakōṭi samaradharuman
santaptakanāmadhēyarenisida suśarmatrigartādhīśvararuman bakāsurana
mommanappa jaṭāsurana makkaḷappa halāyudha musalāyudha kāḷa nīla
rūkṣarākṣasaruman kāmbhōjasudakṣiṇadhararenipa śaṅkhāyudharuman
saubalabr̥hadbalavindānuvindaprabhr̥tigaḷuman kaṇḍu śōkākuḷīkr̥ta
cittanāgi—
va॥ endu paścāttāpaṅgeydu sañjayan santaisi

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: du yathārtham nuḍidārtarilla modaloḷ ninnan hiḍimbāntakan

div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kaviratnaviracitamappa sāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ
duryōdhanapralāpavyāvarṇanam
caturthāśvāsam

div.head: pañcamāśvāsam
div.p:
va॥ embudumadanavarkōsi bhīmasēnana gadāparighapraharaṇadin rudhira
pravāhavaśagatanāgīrda yuvarājanirdēśayan kururājaneydivandāgaḷ

lg.label: mā॥sra॥
lg.l: idu bhīman dēva kāḷiṅgana gajaghaṭeyan konda tāṇam bharaṅge
ydidu bhīman dēva kaurvarananibaruman tinda tāṇam mogambo
kkidu bhīman dēva duśyāsanarudhiramuman pīrda tāṇam chalamba
ṭṭidu bhīman dēva dhātrīsutanibhadoḷebham pōrvavol pōrdaṇām

div.p:
va॥ endu sañjayan pēḻve kebigivigēlda kiḍedeḍeyan pōgē tanna tammana
kaṇṇan karduṅkuuva kāgegaḷuman karuḷa piṇilan tegeva pardugaḷuman
bariya baḷasiṅgaṁ bandu kāḍuva baḷḷugaḷuman naravanugiva narigaḷumaṁ
sereyan tegeva sīḷnāygaḷuman koralan karca nilva kōkaṅgaḷuman
puḍiyoḷ poraḷḷuva pulguruḷḷaḷuman benna bīvan tegeva bētāḷaruman
kattigeyan koṇḍu kapālaman kaḍida kāḷarakkasiyaruman maṇṇa
bāyoḷ tamma bāyaniṭṭu bhīman kuḍiduḷida nettaran kuḍiyal
paḍeyadaḷavaṭiḍu payyaliḍuva picitiniyaruman kaṇḍu tāne sōdu
kaḷedu saudharmikege mikku barevare āṭilan sairisalārade
va॥ antu nindu nōḍi palumbi palavāḍi—
va॥ endatipralāpaṅgeydu
va॥ endu kurukulapradīpan vipralāpaṅgeydu

va॥ endu piṅgākṣan kōpāruṇīkr̥tanētranāgi tanna tammana
kaḷēbaraman nōḍalāṟade allin taḷardu

va॥ āgaḷadan sañjayan kaṇḍu gaṇḍaskōpari sphōṭakmabante nija
priyatanūjānujara śōkadin vihvaḷīkr̥tanappa bhūtaḷēśvaraṅge
nijapriyasakhanappa karṇana darśanadin duḥkham maṟukoḷisugumendu
manadoḷe bagedire

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: bagegoḷa tanna mun tegeda dakṣiṇamuṣṭiya karṇamūladoḷ

div.p:
va॥ antīrda dinakaratanūjanan rājādhirājan nōḍi bāṣpavāridhārā
pūritalōcanan manyudgatakaṇṭhanumasahyaśōkānaladahyamānāntaḥ
karaṇanuvāgi
va॥ endanēkaprakāradin vipralāpaṅgeydu
va॥ endu tannan tāne nindisikoṇḍu

va॥ endu vidhātrige palumbi rādhānandanana mogaman nōḍi
sañjayanintendan
va॥ embuduṁ dēvā nīmintēke palayisuvirendu sañjayanintendan
va॥ endu sañjayan nuḍida nuḍiyanavadharisi

va॥ endu śōkāndhan karṇaviracitanappaḍajan saṅkrandananandanaṅge
muḷidu—

va॥ endu śōkarasaman krōdharasada mēlikki mārpaḍeyuttumirdan
nōḍi naḍeva dandaśūkapatākana gellada muḷisinandamanaṟidu
sañjayanendanele dēvā bhīṣmarityalidarparitra bijayaṅgeyyam
nijagurujanaprārthanābhaṅgam māḍalāgadu in nīm negaḻci
kajjamāvuvaduman nimmajjanoḷelōcisi negaḻpudene pēḻvuduṁ

nijagurujanaprārthanābhaṅgam māḍade sañjayana mātan mīṟade
śaraśayanagatanāgirpa nadīnandanana caraṇāravindavandanaṅgeyyalendu
gāndhāriya nandananeydivanda gaṅgānadīnandananan kaṇḍu

va॥ antīrda nadīnandananaṁ kaṇḍu rājarājaṁ nōḍi manyudgata
kaṇṭhanāgi—

va॥ endu paścāttāpaṅgeyyutuṁ munbarpa tanna mommana kāla soppuḷam
kēḷḍu vikacadhavaḷakuvalayavilāsitōpavāsitaṅgaḷuṁ karṇāntaviśrāntaṁ
gaḷumappa tanna kaṇṇaḷanaredeṟedu daranimīlitalōcanakamalākaramirpante
yirda śantanutanūjana karṇābhyarṇaman pōrdi sañjayanandan
ajjā nimma mommanappa kurukulagaganagabhastimāli bāhuśāli
duryōdhanan bandanendu binnapaṅgeyya yōgi yōgābhiyōga
manupasaṁharisi tanna caraṇōpāntōttamāṅganāgīrda pannagapatākanan
kurukulōttaṁsanan paramānandadin bhīṣmanāśīrvacana sahasraṅgaḷin
parasi dikkarikarānukārigaḷappa nijabhujādaṇḍaṅgaḷinde tegedappi bāṣpāmbu
pūritalōcananāgi

va॥ endu ēkāgiyāgi banda dhr̥tarāṣṭranandanana baravinoḷ saritsutan
samaravr̥ttāntamanaṟidu vismayākrāntasvāntanuvāgi

va॥ endu śōkaṅgeyya rājarājan nadītanūjanan māṇisi nīvammoḍe
viditavēditavyaruṁ bhāvitātmarumāgīrdajñānigaḷante negaḻalāgadendu
nijāgamanavr̥ttāntaman samaraparicchēdamumanaṟipidoḍe kiṟidānuṁ
bēgam cintākāntanāgirdu magane kamalanābhana nābhīnaḷinasambhava
hiraṇyagarbhana manassambhavarappa saptarṣiyaroḷage jagatpavitranappa trinētrasañjāta
sōmanina sōmavaṁśavādudu ā sōmavaṁśadoḷanēkararasu makkaḷu
matikrāntarādar avaroḷ [duṣyanta]nembavaṅge bharatanembavanādan
ātanin baḷikke bharatānvayamembudādudu.

ā bharatakuladoḷapratimaprabalapratāpan pratīpanembanātaṅge puṭṭidar
śantanuvuṁ bāhlikanuṁ vinutanuṁ dēvāpiyumembī nālvar
tanūjarādar alli śantanugaṁ gaṅgādēvigamān puṭṭiden
bālyakāladoḷ toḍaṅgi parigr̥hītabrahmacaryavratapariṇatanāden
emmammanappa śantanugaṁ yōjanagandhiyenisida satyavatigaṁ citrāṅgadanuṁ

vicitravīryanumambikevar tanūjarādar avara parōkṣadoḷ
naṣṭasantatiyāge kr̥ṣṇadvaipāyanara varaprasādadindambikege dhr̥tarāṣṭranuṁ
ambālikege pāṇḍurājanuṁ avara sūḷeyappākege viduranumemba
mūvar tanūjarādar intu sōmavaṁśadindamavicchinnavāgi banda
bharatānvayadoḷennavaraṁ gōtrakalahamembudādudilla nimmoḷnādudu
innānembudanimbukeyvappoḍe pāṇḍavaranoḍambaḍisi sandhiyan
māḍi pūrvakramadoḷ naḍevantu māḍpen innumavaremmodudan
[imbukeyva]r mīṟuvaralla nīnumamma pēḻvudan mīṟade
negaḻvolleyumane suyōdhanan muguḷnage nakku—

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: kaligaṁ śaṅkeye jāgigaṁ berage mēṇ kaṭvāḷ nerambārvanē

div.p: va॥ endu mattamintendan

va॥ endu rājādhirājan nirvyājaśauryāvaḷambiyāgi nuḍiye
gāṅgēyanuṟidativismayākulīkr̥tacittanuṁ muhurmuhurāndōḷi
tōṟtamāṅganuvāgi—
va॥ endu niścayisi
div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kavirannaviracitamappa cāḷukyacakravarti
śrīsāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ bhīṣmavacanavyāvarṇanam
pañcamāśvāsam

div.head: ṣaṣṭhāśvāsam
div.p: va॥ antu gāṅgēyan manadoḷ pogaḻdu

va॥ antu nijanāmāṅkitalēkhaman baredu mommanemma nuḍida
nuḍiyanentumoḍambaḍuvanallan nīnuṁ gāndhāriyumidur kurukula
pradīpaduryōdhananan kānteyaroḷottānuṁ sandhiyan māḍi pūrva
kramadoḷe naḍevantu māḻpudendu sañjayana kayyoḷ koṭṭu
dhr̥tarāṣṭranalligaṭṭappuduṁ kururājan sindhusutana mogaman nōḍi–

va॥ antu gāṅgēyan manadoḷ pogaḻdu aśubhasya kālaharaṇamembī
kāryārthamanavadharisi magane nīnentumemma pēḻdudan kayyoḷḷade
calamane kaykoṇḍu kānteyaroḷ kādidalladirenembeyappoḍe
tīrthayātrege pōda baladēvan barpannegaṁ nīnidēdeyanaṟiyadantu
maygaredu aśvatthāma kr̥pa kr̥tavarmar mēlāpakke barpannegaṁ
kālavañcanaṅgeyyudu mēṇ jalamantravidyābhyāsaman kaykoṇḍu
kurukṣētraduttaradiśābhāgada vaiśampāyanasarōvaraman pokkirdu
indiniruḷan kaḷedu nīn nāḷe negaḻvudēne mahāprasādamida
noḍambaṭṭenantegeyyendu hitōpadēśam berasu jalamantrōpadēśa
man kaykoṇḍu kurukulapitāmahanan bīḷkoṇḍu nijabhujagadā
sahāyanumāgi saṅgrāmabhūmiyoḷ barpalli tannantargatadoḷ
va॥ endu kurukulapradīpan tatsarōvaramaneyduvandāgaḷ
va॥ antu sarōvaramaneyduvandāgaḷ

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: gaganam biltudo mēṇ nelakke nelanēn pattitto mēṇilla pa

div.p: va॥ antu gambhīranīrakaramiparntirda kamalākaraman nōlpilli

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: kurupati ninna mokṣa toḻgaḷ modalāgiye battutirppavī

div.p:
va॥ āgaḷ kurukuḷasarōjarājahaṁsanalliya rājahaṁsigaḷumanā viśva
viśvambharādhaḥkūrmanalliya kūrmaṅgaḷumanā bharatakulacakrēśvaranalliya
cakravākaṅgaḷumanā mattyalōcananalliya matsyaṅgaḷumanā puruṣavara
puṇḍarīkanalliya puṇḍarīkaṅgaḷumanā kurukulakuvalayalalāmanalliya
kuvalayaṅgaḷumanā śaṅkhacakrāṅkitacaraṇanalliya ṣaṭṭaraṇaṅgaḷumanā
gambhīranalliya gambhīradhvaniyumanatikutūhalamberasu nōḍutuṁ bandu
tanna meyyoḷ kaḻaṅgida nettaran karcci kaḷedu karacaraṇavadanaprakṣāḷanaṅgeydu
mukkaḷisiyuguḻvācamanakriyegaḷan nirvartisi jaladēvatānamaskāram
geydu jalamantradin jalamanabhimantrisi

va॥ antu kurukulamahīpālan madhyamalōkapālanāgiyuṁ
paścimadikpālakanante jalanilayanāgiyuṁ

va॥ asnegamattal talvana vadheyin baṟiyaṅgā duryōdhanana
rūpanalliyuvāṟasi kāṇade ēnānumondu kāraṇamāgalvēlku
mandu dharmanandanan garuḍadhvajanoḷ ālōcisidudan
kurukulāntakan kēḷdu

va॥ antumaḷḷi si kurukulamahīpālana br̥hadūrusthaladvandvaṅgaḷan tanna
gadādaṇḍavajradaṇḍadin nurgunurṇimāḍaluṁ ā kauraवेशvarana bāhuśākhe
gaḷan tanna gadākuṭhāradin tattaṟadaṟiyaluṁ ā piṅgākṣana viśālavakṣa
sthaḷaman tanna gadālāṅgaladindirbbageyāgi pōltu parepaluṁ ā
phaṇirājakētanana vikaṭalalāṭaśilāpaṭṭaman tanna gadādaṇḍadin cippu
cippāgirdaluṁ ā draupadīdrōhana maṇimayamakuṭaman tanna gadā
praharaṇadindaruḷḷi pādaprahāradin puḍiyoḷ poraḷcaluṁ ā
suyōdhanana rudhiradhārāpūradin tanna dhagadhagīyamānavisphuliṅga
kōpapāvakaśikhākalāpamanāṟisaluṁ paḍeyade kōpadin kiḍikiḍivōgi
bhīmasēnan mīseyan kaḍidu–

ma॥ antu kurukulakr̥tāntakanantakanante māmasakam masagi
praḷayakalpasaṅkalpaṅgeyda–

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: bhuvanaṅgaḷ padinālku nālku pesarin vārāśigaḷ pattu di

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: caturantakṣitikānte kēḷ jaladhi kēḷ saptārci kēḷ tāta mā
ruta kēḷ mārutamārga kēḷ pagevanan kondenna kōpāgninā

div.p:
va॥ antu pañcabhūtasākṣiyoḷe pūṇḍu naḍedu ajātaśatruge kuru
kulapraḷayaninisida sāhasabhīman sāṣṭāṅgapraṇāmaṅgeyda–

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: enituṁ draupadi muktakēśi namevaḷ tadduḥkhaman kaṇḍukaṁ

div.p:
va॥ endu kurukulāntakan kurukulaviḷayakētudaṇḍabhīkarakrōdha baddhāna kāritamukhanuṁ gāndhārinandanasaṁharaṇōnmīlita karāḷadantadaṣṭōṣṭha
vikaṭabaddhabhrukuṭibhaṅgabhīṣaṇalalāṭapaṭṭanuṁ kuruvaṁśadiśāpaṭṭanuṁ
sandhyārāgasannikāśadurnirīkṣya kaṭākṣavikṣēpalakṣitanuṁ piṅgākṣamāraṇa
kāraṇanuṁ utpanna mahōtsavacalāyamāna sphuradaṅghriyugmanuṁ
kurukulapraḷayajaladhara ninādagambhīrōddāmasiṁhanādapratimapratijñā
pracalitakhiladikcakravāḷanuṁsuyōdhanānujarudhirōdrāri niśśēṣanuvāgi
duryōdhanaviśēṣānvēṣaṇārtham māmasakam masagi kurukula
praḷayakāladaṇḍamenipa nijavijayagadādaṇḍamanattikoṇḍu

va॥ antidiruṁ baṟiyuṁ pāsuṁ pokkuṁ duguṇamuṁ tiguṇamuṁ
aḍḍamuṁ tiḍḍamuṁ paridu kurukṣētradoḷ vajraprahāradinaṟiṅkevarasu
keḍeda parvataṅgaḷante lōhavakkarikegaḷberasu kōḍanūṟe pārltidu parakalisi
keḍeda madāndhagandhasindhuraṅgaḷaḍiyoḷaḍaṅgidane gettu kaigulti nōḍiyuṁ
tanna bhīkaragadāghātadoḷ jāṟi paṟivaṟidu tūṟuvāṟāda
kāmbhōjāvaḷigaḷa turuṣkaturaṅgamaṅgaḷaḍiyoḷaḍaṅgidane gettu baḷasi
balavandu nōḍiyuṁ tanna niśitanārācaparamparābhighātadoḷ taggi
nurgunuṟiyāgi keḍeda tēra palagegaḷoḷ maygaredane gettu bedaṅki
nōḍiyuṁ tanna niṣṭhuracaraṇasaṅghaṭṭadoḷ paḍalbaṭṭa vīrabhaṭarkkaḷa
makuṭaṅgaḷoḷ talegaredane gettu sōdisi nōḍiyuṁ nettara toṟegaḷoḷe
kālgutti nōḍiyuṁ neṇana baṇambegaḷoḷage kaidugutti nōḍiyuṁ
aḍagina giḍivinoḷ suḷidu nōḍiyuṁ naravina neraviyoḷ toṟaldu
nōḍiyuṁ mūḷeya moraḍigaḷanēṟi nōḍiyuṁ miduḷa
kōṟegaisaṟoḷ pokku karuḷa maḍeyan pikki parapi nōḍiyuṁ

pallaḷa baṇambegaḷoḷ paravasaṅgoṇḍu meṭṭiyuṁ aṭṭiya
beṭṭaphaṭṭadiṭṭedegaḷoḷ niṭṭisiyuṁ vyākaraṇanante śabdamanālisiyuṁ
bēṇṭekāṟanante aḍivajje yanaṟisiyuṁ garuḍanante hāvina
haṟavigeyanāraydu nōḍiyuṁ vaidyanantehitagadānvēṣaṇaṅgeydu
nōḍiyuṁ munnaṁ paraśurāmanē neladoḷuḷḷarasu makkaḷellaruma
nirpattondu sūḻgeragaṁ pilvapesarilladantu kondavandira norenettaroḷ
tīvi tanna tāyge nīriḷiyaluṁ tandege nīrguḍalumandu māḍida
syamantakapañcakaṅgaḷamba pasara parmaḍugaḷoḷage mūḍi muḻkāḍi
nōḍiyuṁ nālvatteṇsāvi[ra] paripramāṇakurukṣētradoḷelliyuṁ
duryōdhananan āṟasi kāṇade vismayambaṭṭavana biṭṭa bīḍiṅge
niṭṭu[va]rigoṇḍu

va॥ endu śibirarakṣakara garbhamuṁ śibiranitambiniyara garbhamuṁ
oḍanoḍane gaḷiyise siṁhagarjaneyin garjisi kururājadvārō
pāntamaneyduvandāgaḷ

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: deseyan tekkane tīvi parbbi gaganam kūḍiṭṭavol nīlgadu
kkasanō bhīmano ītanāvanenutuṁ gāndhāri balkutte be

div.p: va॥ antu kaṇḍu billambeṟagumāgi –

va॥ embannegaṁ vijr̥mbhisi kayyusaradin gurujanakke samucitācāraman
[ma]ṟedu bhīman bhīmanādaman negaṭṭi

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: dhr̥tarāṣṭrakṣitipāla kēḷ janani kēḷ gāndhāri koṇḍen bhava

div.p: va॥ embuduṁ gāndhāri jarāsandhārige baddhāñjaliyāgi
va॥ embudumandharājaṅge pavanatanūjanabhimukhanāgi

va॥ embuduṁ asnegaṁ tvaritagatiyin vindhvaka jālakaremba kirātadūtar
bandu dūraprōttarāgi dēvā duryōdhananan kurukṣētradoḷelliyuvāṟasi

kāṇade madhyandinasamayadoḷ lalāṭantapavāda tapanatāpadin
tr̥ṣṇābhibhūtarāgi sakalajanāpyāyanakāriyappa vaiśampāyanasarōvarakke
nīrguḍiyalendu pōgi halakuliśakamalaśaṅkhacakralāñchanamappaḍi
vajje yan koḷada taḍiyoḷ kaṇḍavalli poṟamaṭṭa pajjeyallade pokka
pajjeyan kāṇevene pavanatanayanavaranoḍagoṇḍu bandu
dharmatanayādigaḷga tadvr̥ttāntamanellamanaṟipe yuktiyuktamappa dūtara
mātan sakalajagadutpattisthitipraḷayaprabhuvenisida viṣṇu kēḷdu manadoḷavadharisi

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: tananoḷ nāḷeyi kūḍi barparavarinnuṁ bāradannaṁ suyō
dhananan munname kaygemāṭpudu baṟikkāgal gēlal barkumē

div.p:
va॥ aḍaṟadoḍegaḷe pōgi pūgoḷanan mutti duryōdhananan poṟamaḍisi
pageyan paribhavisuvudendaravindanābhan dharmanandanādigaḷanoḍa
goṇḍubandu kirātadūtasaṁsūcitasaṅkētamanalli kaṇḍu duryōdhana
naḍivajje yappudun tappilladaṟidu nissandigdhacittanāge –
va॥ endu dharmanandanan duryōdhanana duryaśassige talevāgi

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: jaḷaman mun tave pīrdu pīrvenasuhr̥draktambuvan tōrpene

div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kaviratnaviracitamappa cāḷukyacakravarti
śrīsāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ kauravasarōvarapravēśavarṇanam
ṣaṣṭhāśvāsam

div.head: saptamāśvāsam
div.p:
va॥ āgaḷā koḷana baḷasiṅge bandu nibbaramāgi bobbiḍidabbaraṅgeyyu palateṟada
paṟegaḷan poyyiyuṁ śaṅkhaṅgaḷan pūraisiyuṁ bhērigaḷan tāṭisiyuṁ
kahaḷegaḷanottisiyuṁ pañcamahāvādyaṅgaḷan bājisiyuṁ entuṁ
poṟamaḍisalāṟadire suyōdhananan pesargoṇḍu nakulanāspōṭisi—
va॥ ene sahadēvanāspōṭisi—
va॥ embudumarjunan vijr̥mbhisi—

va॥ embuduṁ dharmanandanan dhr̥tarāṣṭranandanana munne geyda
adharmaman bageyade kulakramayuktamappa nirmalakṣatradharmamane
bagedu

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: śvara nīn sandhigoḍambaḍintu koḷanan pokkirpudēn takkudē

div.p:
va॥ embudumā nuḍige sairisalārade ūtenna saraṅgelloḍallade
poṟamaḍuvanallanivaṅgāne sālvenendu bhīmasēnanuddāmakōpā
ṭōpaviracitabaddhabhrukuṭiyāgi

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: tave pīrdu baṭekke ninna saviyan nōḻpon

lg.label: ma॥sra॥
lg.l: jaḷadoḷ mīnirpavōl nīn koḷadoḷe muḷugidarkkaṭṭā kōḍa sēḍiṁ
goḷagāday ninna duryōdhanapesargidu lajjākaram tōṟiday ni
nnaḷavan chī sattarēn puṭṭare poṟamaḍu nīn kayyugoḷ kauravēndra

div.p: va॥ antu muṭṭi modalisi nuḍidumantuṁ poṟamaḍisalāṟade

lg.label: ma॥sra॥
lg.l: enituṁ pokkirdapay nīn poṟamaḍu koḷadin draupadīdrōha duśyā

div.p: va॥ endu mattamiirade
va॥ ā prastāvadoḷ

va॥ antu jalacarajīvarāśigaḷellamasuṅgoḷe gōḷuṇḍegoḷe kūḻgudigoḷe
mahōttuṅgasiṁhakētanan siṁhanādaṅgeyye

va॥ antu bhīmaturmuḷisi sairisalārade jalamantramanēnuman
bageyade kōpōdrēkamane bagedu

va॥ āgaḷā jalastambhamantramallamavinītanappa rājaputranālōcisida
mantradante pariṇāmaramaṇīyavāgade keḍeyumahaṅkāraṅgiḍade

va॥ antunijabhujagadeyan tūguttumirda dandaśūkapatākana seragillada
meygalitanakke macci taleyan tūgi nijabhujapratāpanirjitanikhila
bhīmasēnan bhīmasēnan kauravanidirgevandu

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: munnaṁ tave pīrdurdañji nīn puge koḷanan

div.p:
va॥ endu neḻananuṇṭumāḍi modalisi nuḍiye duryōdhananati
krōdhānalanāgi

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: rvamumandellige pōytu paṇḍa ninagindī gaṇḍanār māḍidar

div.p: va॥ endu muṭṭi modalisi nuḍiye bhīmasēnan muguḷnagenakku

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: nene citrāṅgadanindam andu ninag’ ād’ āpattanā bannaman
nene nīn gōgrahaṇaprapañcadoḷe meytirdurdan ninna ta
nene pintikkida ninna munnina kavalbannaṅgaḷan kauravā

div.p:
va॥ enduragadhvajanan marmōdghāṭanaṅgeydu modalisidanitaṟoḷe
ninduragadhvajan munidanibara mogaman nōḍi

lg.label: ma॥sra॥
lg.l: berasīgaḷ barke bhīman harisutanoḍanī mūvaruṁ barke mēṇa
yvare barkentuṁ kr̥tāntātmaja pavanaja gāṇḍīvadhanvargaḷī mū
varoḷorban barke kr̥ṣṇan toḍardanibaroḷaṁ barke mēṇ

div.p: va॥ enduragadhvajan garuḍadhvajanan sambōdhisi nuḍiye

va॥ ene dharmanandanan dhr̥tarāṣṭranandanan munne geyda adharmaman
neneyade nirmalakṣatradharmamane nenedu—
va॥ embuduṁ bhīmasēnanintendan
va॥ ene duryōdhanan bhīmasēnana nuḍiyane samarthisi

va॥ endu nuḍidu kañjanābhanasamañjasikeyoḷ tannan tegaḻdu
nuḍidudakarkevaisi
va॥ embannegamā prastāvadoḷ

va॥ antu suyōdhanaṅge saipu barpanteyuṁ sakalajagatpavitra
tīrthasalilasampāditanikhilāghamarṣaṇan saṅkarṣaṇan jaṅgamahimā
calame barpanteyuṁ bandu tammanibarondāgi gondaṇisirda
pāṇḍunandanaruman ēkākiganāgi ninda kurukula
svāmiyuman kaṇḍu dēvakīnandanana vadanāravindaman nōḍi
vismayākrāntacittanāgi manadoḷ kaṭṭukaḍedu tanagēṇigida phaṇirājakētananan
manadeṟakadin parasi garuḍakētananan pāṇḍavarayvaruman parasalollade
muḷidu tammanavarayvaruman nōḍi—
va॥ endu nuḍida halāyudhana nuḍige cakrāyudhanintendan

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: muniyade pāṇḍunandanarge bāḍamanaydane bēḍe pōgi drō

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: dane sattar tanujānujar palavaruṁ tadduḥkhaman kaṇḍeni

div.p:
va॥ antu pogaḻdu rājarājana nirvyājaśauryakke saṅkarṣaṇanāścaryambaṭṭu
peṟatēnumanenalaṟiyade dharmanandanādigaḷa mogaman nōḍi
nimmayvaroḷārāgiyumītanoḷorvane kāduvudu kādi geldaṁ
baṟiyam duryōdhanan nelananāḷge ātaṅguṟida nālvar besakeydu
bāḷvirendu nuḍiye bhīmasēnanidirgevandu

va॥ antu marunnandanan rōhiṇīnandanaṅge nuḍidu dvandvayuddhakke
dharmanandanādigaḷa mogaman nōḍi

va॥ embudan kurukulajalapraḷayakālavajradharanenisida mārutigaṁ
pāñcālīkuñcitakēśapāśākr̥ṣṭipātakapradhānanihitanenisida phaṇirāja
kētanaṅgaṁ dharmanandanādigaḷirdu dharmayuddhamane samakaṭṭi
dāgaḷ—
va॥ antu dharmayuddhakke kayyāytāgaḷ—
div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kaviratnaviracitamappa bāḷukkacakravarti
śrīsāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ bhīmasuyōdhanagadāyuddhavarṇanam
saptamāśvāsam

div.head: aṣṭamāśvāsam
div.p:
va॥
antu samarōtsukacittanāgi sāhasabhīman drōṇācāryaṅge manadoḷ
namaskāraṁmāḍi duryōdhanan baladēvaṅge namaskāraṅgeydu pañca
padaṅgulāyāmamuṁsahasraṅgulavalayanirmitamumaṣṭāṅgulasthūla
mūlāgramumappattamagadeyoḷ catuḥpadaṅgulāyāmamuṁ śatāṅgula
valayaparimitamuṁ caturaṅgulāgramūlamumappa madhyamagadeyoḷ
tripadaṅgulāyāmamuṁ ṣaṭtriṁśadvalayāṅgulamuṁ dvyaṅgulāgramūla
mumappadhamagadeyoḷ tāmuttamamaruṣarappudeṟeṁ tamaganurūpa
mapputtama gadeyoḷ daśāṅgulapariṇāhagrakanattanaka vicitrālaṅkr̥tasvarūpa
samanvitaṅgaḷumappa gadegaḷumanivarrumāydukoṇḍu ālīḍhapratyālīḍha
samapādavaiṣṇavamaṇḍalāgramumemba pañcavidhasthānakaṅgaḷoḷ vāma
dakṣiṇabāhyābhyantarāsthālanavibhēdaṅgaḷoḷ viḷambitavākuñcitavā
sphōṭitavākṣiptamuddyāmitaṁ digbhrāmitamucitaviruddhamacintyamumeṁ
benbaṁ teṟada praharaṇaṅgaḷoḷ atiparicitarāgi vaiśākhasthānadoḷ nindu

va॥
antodavi—

lg.label: u॥
lg.l: kariyan nuṅgi kaḷiṅganan noṇeda darpakkondugoḷ mattahō

div.p:
va॥
endu muṭṭi modalise

lg.label: mā॥
lg.l: vade poydan kālgaḷan tōḷgaḷanagaldoraman kenneyan nettiyan kō

div.p:
va॥
antu poydonduman bageyade—

va॥
antirvara gadāghaṭṭanaparighasaṅghaṭṭanadindogedu negaṭṭi kiḍiya keṇḍaṅgaḷa
taṇḍaṅgaḷanoḷakoṇḍu gaganamaṇḍaladoḷ poge negadu mahōtpātakētu
cakradante suṭṭuregāḷiyoḷ suṭigoṇḍu taṟagelegaḷ pāṟuvante desedesege
pāṟuva phaṇāphanacakradindu[ḷḷuvuḷḷā]kāramāge cakrākāradinogeva diśā
cakradin ā sakalakulācalacakradoḷage [kaurava]cakradaṁ]dam tiṟṟane tiruguva
dharācakrabhrāntiyoḷ tamage cittabhrāntiyāge dīrghōṣṇaphūtkāraṁ

geyda nāgarājacakradin muṣṭamāda saptasāgarasaliladoḷ malamalane
maṟuguva jalacaracakradinatibhayaṅkaramumadbhutamumāge kāduttirpalli

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: nelasida binnaṇam sogasi binnaṇaman gele kāṇke kāṇkeyan
gele javaman javam gele balam balaman gele daṇḍe daṇḍeyan
gele muḷisuṇṇe pūṇṇe muḷisan gele sattvadaḷurke sattvaman

div.p:
va॥
antu naṭaroḷ pōkuḷiyāḍuvantorvarorvaran gelal
neṟeyadire duryōdhanan karaṁ muḷidu—

va॥
antu modalisade iṟivudu kuṭilālāytumallendu muṭṭi
modalisi

va॥
antu kuliśābhighātadin nīlācalame keḍevante keḍedu
mūrcchāgatanāgidda bhīmasēnaniravan kaṇḍu gāṇḍīvi
kōpāturāṭōpaman tāldi—

va॥
ā prastāvadoḷ dhātunijraragiri keḍevantu keḍedirda pageyan
nōḍi

va॥
ā prastāvadoḷ dharmayuddhaman nenedu

va॥
antu mūrccheyan mārutiyeṟṟaṟtāgaḷ—

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: tiḷidāgaḷ nenadintuṭindu nelanan māṟuddi kayyan dharā

div.p:
va॥ antu dikkarivarakarānukārigaḷappa nijabhujastambhagaḷin kurukulamahīśana
bāḷakadaḷīstambhagaḷananukarisuva toḍegaḷanuḍidu āśramadoḷ puḍiyoḷ
poralci tanna munne nuḍidurubhaṅgapratijñeyan tīrci makuṭa
bhaṅgapratijñeyan tīrccalendu kurukulāntakan māmasakam masagi

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: tidu gaḍa bāgadī talege takkudanīgaḷe māḷpenendu kō

div.p:
va॥
antu guṇaratnārṇavan pratijñāpūrṇanumāge

lg.label: mā॥
lg.l: kada gaṇḍan sāhasāṅkan subhaṭara javanin munnamenduṁ nabhōbhā

div.p:
va॥
antu muḷidirdu tanna tammana manaman nōyisalāṟadeyuṁ
duryōdhanaṅgādavastheyan nōḍalāṟadeyuṁ baladēvan dvārāvatige
pōdanannegamittal

lg.label: mā॥
lg.l: muḷisina nañjakke kollandina jatugr̥hadoḷ suṭṭu kollandinurvī
taḷaman jūdāḍi gellandina nijakabarībandhaman tanna sattō
jjvaḷadindaṁ tammanindaṁ tegeyisi naḍeda nīcanā drōhanā saṁ

div.p:
va॥
endu bhīmasēnan yājñasēnigādityana sārathiyarpante
nijōruyugaḷavikaḷanāgirda duryōdhananan tōṟe

va॥ endu tanna kayyan piḍidu tegevudumantegeyyendumākeya
vēṇīsaṁhāraman tāne māḍi
va॥ endu pogaḻdu māṅgalyamālālaṅkr̥tam māḍe

lg.label: mā॥
lg.l: smarasañjīvana kr̥ṣṇa pūmuḍidaḷ ā śr̥ṅgāram ā bhāvamā
pariṇā vibhramam ā beḍaṅgu negaḻd’ ā saundaryamā biṅkamā
taraḷāpāṅgavilāsam ā laṭaham ā lāvaṇyam ā puṇyam ā
naḍu mele tōḷ nīlda beralugur koralandaṁ

lg.label: lalitavr̥tta ॥
lg.l: cārurucisūtrasukumāram eseguṁ hr̥dayahāri pogaḻal kiridu māsatiya rūpam

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: naḷitōḷ int’ āgavēḍā toḷapa toḍegaḷ int’ āgavēḍā nitamba
sthaḷadoḷvint’ āgavēḍā sogayipa nagegaṇṇōṭav’ int’ āgavēḍā
koḷādindaṁ banda lakṣmīvadhuv enisuva peṇbhāvav’ int’ āgavēḍā

div.p:
va॥ ant’ irda jātavēdōjāteya pārijātapallavōllasitanikāma kōmala
karataḷasparśanadoḷ saṅkrāntaviśrāntavikacasundarēndīvarakusumamālā
nukārikaṭākṣacchaṭācchōṭanadoḷ apagatasamarapariśraman āgi

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: hari kēḷa dharmaja kēḷa surēndrasutar kēḷa mādrīsutar kēḷimi

div.p: va॥ endu bhēriyan tāṭisidante gambhīradhvaniyan garjise

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: tkaraman nērpaḍe kaṭṭi pūjisidarā dōrdaṇḍaman bhīmanā

div.p: va॥ ā prastāvadoḷ
va॥ antu bhujadaṇḍamuman gadādaṇḍamuman pūjisi
div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kavirannaviracitamappa cāḷukyacakravarti
śrīsāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ duryōdhanamakuṭōrubhaṅgavarṇanam
aṣṭamāśvāsam

div.head: navamāśvāsam
div.p:
va॥ antiparnnegaṁ cakri tān kālacakravartiyappudeṟedasama sāhasōddāma
naptr̥śvatthāmana baravanaṟedanāgatabādhāparicchēdaman māḍalendu dhr̥ṣṭa
dyumnaśikhaṇḍicēkitānayudhāmanyūttamaujasaruman śrutasōmaka
pramukharappa pāṇḍavasūnugaḷappa pañcapāṇḍavaruman bīḍiṅge kāpu
pēḻdu hastyaśvarathapadāti balam berasu hastināpurakke kaḷipi pāṇḍavarayduru
manoḍaṅgoṇḍu sakalavanacarajalacarakañjakumudēndīvaramāḷāniḷaya
mappa nīlāṅgaḷakke nīlāṅgan pōdanannegamitta gāṅgēyan aṟipe kauravēśvara
nirddayan aśvatthāman aṟidu

lg.label: pr̥thvi॥
lg.l: manam calise māsi tāṟida kuruḷḷaḷuṁ tanna bi
nnanirda mogadin tavildire vilāsamuṁ munde kaṁ

div.p:
va॥ antu kumbhasambhavasambhavan kamalanābhana hr̥dayabhavanamr̥tābdhi
sambhaveyan kaṇḍu nīnārge ettaṇindaṁ bande ellige pōdape
endu besagoḷḷe

va॥ embuduṁ drōṇanandanan nārāyaṇan besase pōdapenenda
lakṣmiya mātan avadharisi muguḷnagenakku

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: kuḷarajadinde nīn poredu rājasadoḷ nelasirpe gōvugā

div.p:
va॥ adalladeyumamr̥tasamudramanthanadoḷ puṭṭuvundu airāvatadoḍane
puṭṭidudaṟin viparītavr̥ttiyuṁ candranoḍane puṭṭidudaṟin
kaḷaṅkasvabhāvamuṁ kaustubhadoḍane puṭṭidudaṟin kaṭhinatvamuṁ
vāgdēviyoḍane puṭṭidudaṟin vācāḷateyuṁ amara vairiyoḍane
puṭṭidudaṟin grahaṇasallēkhanābuddhiyuṁ vaidyanoḍane puṭṭidudaṟin
praṇaśūlavēdiyuṁ nāradanoḍane puṭṭidudaṟin kalahasvabhāvamuṁ
kāḷakūṭadoḍane puṭṭidudaṟin koleyuṁ kalpadoḍane puṭṭidudaṟin
sōkuṁ accarasiyaroḍane puṭṭidudaṟin pāṟugeyyumuṁ ninage
sahajavāgirduvu

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: poḍe kēḷade munde nindaran kāṇade ta

div.p: va॥ endu lakṣmiyan viḍambanaṅgeydanitajoḷaṁ māṇade

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: bhīman gaḍa phalguṇan gaḍamaḷḷar gaḍa saṁ

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: daranandī kajjadoḷ nīn toḍarda maruḷe beṇḍāgadir pōgu nīn ce

div.p:
va॥ endaśvatthāmanuddāmakōpāṭōpabaddhabhrukuṭiyuṁ taraḷatāmra
lōcananumāge—

va॥ antu taḷaveḷagāda lakṣmīkānteya caḷadaḷikuḷavinīḷakuṭilakuntalaṅgaḷan
taḷamāre tegedu kurukulakuṭumbana ghaṭacēṭiyan koṇḍupōpante
maguṟci koṇḍupōgi bhīmasēnana gadāghātadoḷūrubhaṅgamuṁ
padāghātadoḷ makuṭabhaṅgamumāge suraldu teraḷdu suyōdhananire—
va॥ antenisida kururājanandananan gurunandanan nōḍi

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: kuḷikana pallaḷan muṟiye mōdidarār kaḍupinde siṁhaman
muḷayisi dādeyan piḍidu kiṭṭavarār madahastiyan neṟaṁ

div.p: va॥ endāyasambaṭṭu kāla mēle kavidubiṭṭu

va॥ endu gurunandanan vipralāpaṅgeyyu tanna mēludaṟa seṟagindātana
taleya mēle kedaṟirda bhīmasēnana caraṇarajaman toḍedu kaḷedu
va॥ endu nuḍidu manadoḷ kaṭṭukaḍedu—
va॥ endu nuḍida bhāradvājatanūjana nuḍige rājarājanavadharisi —
va॥ endu paramanirvēdaparāyaṇanāgi nuḍidu
va॥ endu nuḍida suyōdhanaṅge
va॥ endu cintisi

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: vade kauntēyaranikki pandalegaḷan tandenna mundikku kū
rada dāyādara mikka pandalegaḷan kaṇṇāre kaṇḍenna ci

div.p:
va॥ embudumadāva gahanamantegeyyenendu pūṇṇu mahīkānteyuman
śrīkānteyuman kaṇṇiḍe jaḍiyu

va॥ antirvaran niyōjisi nēsaṟa paḍuvinamirdu nijapatiyan
bīḷkoṇḍu payaṇambōgi hastināpuraman pokku alli—

va॥ antiṟavāgaḷ halavu divasam kādi piriduṁ payaṇambandu baṟaldu
kōraisi nidregeyduvar toṭṭane nidreyindeṟtattu muṭṭibandāgaḷā kaḷakaḷaman
kēḷdu karataḷadin kaṇṇan poseyuttumeṟdu tantamma taledeseyoḷirda
karavāḷan koṇḍu ninda neleyoḷ taḷaridirda talegāpināḷukkaḍadāḷa
mēlikki ukkaḍadāḷ garavaṭṭigeyāḷa mēlikki garavaṭṭigeyāḷ māmasakam
masagi javan nēṟi baṟpante peṇḍir makkaḷannade nivaḷiviṭṭamappina
moṇḍakkōṭigebalamellaman [piḷḷe]pesarillamembante koṇḍu tanage
kaṭṭidiroḷirda dhr̥ṣṭadyumnanuman muṭṭi modalisi tammayyanan
paribhavisida pageyan koṇḍu dasevaḷigeydu śikhaṇḍicēkitānayudhā
manyūttamaujasaprabhr̥tigaḷumanikki pāṇḍavara śaṅkeyin śrutasōmaka
prabhr̥tigaḷappa pañcapāṇḍavara talegaḷan koṇḍu taṟataṟane nēsaṟa
mūḍuvāgaḷ bandu koḷ ninna naccina pāṇḍavara talegaḷaveyendu
duryōdhanana mundikkidoḍā mahānubhāvanā talegaḷan nīḍuṁ
bhāvisi nōḍi

va॥ adukāraṇam nīn prāyaścittapavitragātranāge himavantakke pōpudendu
suyōdhanan nuḍida nuḍiyanavadharisi rudrāvatāran karaṁ siggāgi
paścāttāpambaṭṭu pradēśadin taḷardu hastināpurada puravīdigaḷoḷagane
baruttumandina yuddhāvasānadolāda kaḷakaḷadin kaḷakuḷavāda
purajanaṅgaḷa neraviyoḷagorōndeḍeyoḷ

pavaḷada muttina māṇikada pēḷigegaḷan pottu kaḷakaḷavidēnendu
nereyaṅgaḍiya mundaṇaṅgaḍiya paradaran kaṇḍu besagoḷḷa paccapasi
ygararuman kubjavāmanabadhirajanaṅgaḷberasu tamman tegevara kayyan
patti barpa gāvilarumaṁ purajanaṅgaḷberasu puravīdigaḷan suttiyuṁ
baḷisiyuṁ barpa vr̥ddhakañcukigaḷuman poṭṭe baṭṭāgirdu paṟanaṭṭa
naḍuvan nōḍi pokku miṭṭiḍu miḍukalaṇṇade kaṭṭuṭṭigoḷḷa garavaṭṭigeya
kāpināḷgaḷuman kajjaman kālaman pārva kajjaligaḷuman
mārgamīyade badirada lōbhigaḷigaḷuman noṇḍu palgijidōḍuva
pullagigaḷuman mōdi maygoḷ nindiṟiva arigaligaḷuman seragaṁ
beragaṁ bageyade niccaṭagaligaḷuman ettānumirdumiṟivandōḍiṟiva
dhuragaligaḷuman āḷtana besanan maraḷi kēḷada besagaligaḷuman
ubbuḷiyaḷaviya lekkakkiṟidu besakeyya paṟagaligaḷuman aḷavanaṟidu
bēgiṟiva ballagaligaḷuman mābarlaman kaṇḍu pūṇseṟiva
kaḍugaligaḷuman bēḍidarge bēḍitan koṭṭu bandiṟiva
kasavaragaligaḷuman mattamaṇṇe naḍediṟiva naḍegaligaḷuman nōḍi
vismayambaṭṭu raudraprāyaścittapravartanārthaṁ himavatparvatakke pōpuduṁ
suyōdhanan cittasamādhānaṅgeyyu ajitanan smariyisi paralōkaman
sādhisuvenendu kr̥tavarmādigaḷan parijanaṅgaḷuman visarjisi
taddivasāvasānasamayadoḷ prāṇavisarjanōnmukhanādanintu

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: ydudinam bhāskaranandanan dinayugam śalyan bharaṅgeydu kā
tu dinaṅgaḷ padineṇṭaṟaṁ samedudā raudrāvaham bhāratam

div.p: va॥ antu bhāratam samarabhārāvatāramāge—
div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kaviratnaviracitamappa cāḷukyacakravarti
śrīsāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ duryōdhanōtkrāntivarṇanam
navamāśvāsam

div.head: daśamāśvāsam
div.p:
va॥ āgaḷ murāntakan samaravijayiyappa sāhasabhīmana sāhasakke
mecci dharmanandanana mogaman nōḍi

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: guḍanavagendoḍēn nuḍiya bāgada bīrada kīrtivalli dāṁ

div.p: va॥ endu murāntakan pogaḻdu kurukulāntakana mogaman nōḍi

lg.label: ma॥sra॥
lg.l: mane peṇbaṁ makkaḷembī nuḍi masi nijakr̥ṣṇāṅgadoḷ puṭṭi kīrtyaṁ

div.p:
va॥ endu nārāyaṇan cāḷukyanārāyaṇana śūrakr̥tyaṅgaḷan
pogaltuttirpinamāgaḷ dhr̥tarāṣṭranuṁ gāndhāriyuṁ baral
dharmanandanan poḍemaṭṭu

va॥ embudumā prastāvadoḷ duryōdhanana mādēviyarappa
bhānumatiyuṁ candramatiyuṁ modalāda atirathamahārathārdharatha
pramukhasāmantamaṇḍalikāntaḥpurakānteyarondāgi tantamma jīvitē
śvararan saṅgrāmaraṅgadoḷaṟasuttuṁ bandu kāṇade

lg.label: caṁ॥
lg.l: śarakoḷe satta yōdhapatigaḷ paḍe vāraṇapātadinda cā

div.p:
va॥ antu śōkavihvalarāgi barpalli kauravanitambiniyar gāndhārī
dhr̥tarāṣṭrara kāla mēle kavidubiṭṭu

va॥ endu karuṇākrandanaṅgeyyudumāgaḷadan kaṇḍu dharmanandana
nandharājaṅgaṁ gāndhārigaṁ poḍemaṭṭu—
va॥ endu dharmanandanan nuḍiya dhr̥tarāṣṭranavadharisi—

va॥ ene id’ āva gahanamavagaḷgaṁ saṁskāravidhiyin saṁskāraman
māḻpen end’ āgaḷ

lg.label: kaṁ॥
lg.l: kane kaṇḍaḷ kunti tanna coccila maganan

div.p:
va॥ antu karṇana kaḷebaraman taḷkaisi putranan kaṇḍa teṟadin
paṟayisuva nijajananiyan kaṇḍu pāṇḍunandananidēnendu
besagoḷḷe
va॥ embuduṁ dharmanandanādigaḷatyantaduḥkhitarāgi intendar

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: dirō mun pēḻdoḍe mātegā piriyanemmaṇṇaṅge sāmrājyabhū

div.p:
va॥ embuduṁ nārāyaṇan kṣatriyadharma[marmadindādu]dan sairisuvu
dendavaraṁ vigataśōkar māḍe [samāhitacittarāgi] duryōdhanaprabhr̥tigaḷa
peṇaṅgaḷanondeḍeyoḷiṭṭu dvijarin saṁskārakarma[man nirvartisi]
karṇana kaḷebaraman brāhmaṇarin tāve saṁskāraman māḍi samastagaṁ
jaladānakriyegaḷan nirvartise tadanantaraṁ kontiyuṁ gāndhāriyuṁ
dhr̥tarāṣṭranuṁ kurunarēndranarasiyar modalāgellarumanaśanadīkṣeyan
kaikoṇḍuttamamōkṣaman tāldidar.

va॥ embuduṁ bhīmaṅge paṭṭabandhaman māḍbudendu vāsudēvan muntāgi
sahadēvan nirūpisida śubhamuhūrtadoḷ hastinapuraman pokku

lg.label: ma॥
lg.l: ṇṇeseyoḷ vēdaninādadin parase paṅkējākṣiyar kūḍi saṁ
hasabhīmaṅge manōmudam berasu kr̥ṣṇan kaṭṭidan paṭṭaman

div.p:
va॥ antu bhīmasēnaṅge paṭṭaman kaṭṭi hastinapuradoḷ tammaiyyaruṁ
ōmasētuvaraṁ mahāmaṇḍalikarin besakeysikoṇḍu sukhadin
rājyam geyyuttirdar
div.trailer:
idu samastabhuvanavallabhajanāśrayan śrīpr̥thvīvallabhan
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaran paramabhaṭṭārakan śrīsatyāśrayakulatilakan
śrīmadāhavamalladēvaśrīpādakalpapādapāśrayāsannavarti
kavicakravarti kavirannaviracitamappa cāḷukyacakravarti
śrīsāhasabhīmavijayadoḷ bhīmasēnapaṭṭābhiṣēkavarṇanam
daśamāśvāsam
